title: Extracted topic metadata
description: The <slug>.meta.json written beside each <slug>.md. Structural facts only — the .md holds the raw factual extraction. Nothing here reproduces copyrighted body text.

group.description: Level-1 group label (nav section / accordion), e.g. 'Core Concepts'.

groupSlug.description: Kebab slug of the group; the level-1 folder name.

order.description: 1-based position of this topic within its group, preserving the source nav sequence.

topic.description: Level-2 label: the topic within the group, e.g. 'Caching'.

slug.description: Topic slug — the URL's last path segment (authoritative); the level-2 folder name and filename stem.

date.description: The 'Updated/Published <date>' line, verbatim; null if absent.

access.description: 'gated' when the body shows the profile's paywall sentinel or a nav lock; else 'open'. Gated pages yield only intro + TOC.

hasVideo.description: True when the page embeds a video (per the profile's video sentinels).

toc.description: The page's on-page table of contents — becomes the .md section scaffold and the --validate coverage checklist.

related.description: On-page related-item labels, when the page lists them.

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp stamped at extraction time, or 'unknown'.
